name: neuro-commerce-os-marketplace
description: The Neuro-Commerce OS — a complete autonomous business operating system for Claude. Diagnostic → Brand → Content → Ads, with its own MCP server.

plugins.name: neuro-commerce-os
plugins.description: Complete Neuro-Commerce OS: 5 phases (Bible, NeuroBrand OS, Kontent Kreation, Universal Meta Ads, Predictive Growth), 13 skills, 5 specialized agents, and video/social reel diagnostics. Standalone MCP server with 19 tools, 24 resources, and 4 prompts.
